resources. In the 21st century, to develop into a moderately prosper-
                                                                                                                    ous country and accomplish the most spectacular social change in
                                                                                                                    the history of mankind, China needs to overcome a series of bottle-
                                                                                                                    necks and constraints, among which a fundamental problem is how
                                                                                                                    to accelerate financial development and build an efficient market
                                                                                                                    credit system to raise the tremendous medium- and long-term devel-
                                                                                                                    opment funds in support of modernization. China’s financial development model is a government-led one in
                                                                                                                    terms of market-oriented finance. The government-let financial devel-
                                                                                                                    opment requires planning, regulation, and services, which is condu-
                                                                                                                    cive to maximizing the organizational function of the government,
                                                                                                                    well handling of relations in a mixed economy, integrating resources
                                                                                                                    and accelerating the development. The market-oriented financial sec-
                                                                                                                    tor requires market players to carry out financial activities by making
                                                                                                                    full use of market-based instruments. This is also a vital factor for
                                                                                                                    improving the financial efficiency and avoiding market risks and is in
                                                                                                                    compliance with the requirements of the law of economic and finan-
                                                                                                                    cial activities.
